mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meeting_participants( meeting_id, user_id, status, message ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT mp.participant_id, mp.meeting_id, mp.user_id, u.nickname, mp.status FROM meeting_participants mp JOIN users u ON mp.user_id=u.user_id WHERE mp.meeting_id=#{meetingId} ORDER BY mp.applied_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE meeting_participants SET status=#{status}, approved_at=CASE WHEN #{status}="APPROVED" THEN NOW() ELSE approved_at END, cancelled_at=CASE WHEN #{status}="CANCELLED" THEN NOW() ELSE cancelled_at END WHERE participant_id=#{participantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting_participants WHERE meeting_id=#{meetingId} AND status="APPROVED"
